title: Teammates
description: Shows your teammates on supported servers.
body:
![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)
[![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/SorkoPiko/Teammates)
[![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/9cGtmS8Sb8)
# Teammates
Easily see your teammates, even when they are out of render distance.

## Features
**🎯 Team Member Tracking**
- See teammate marker arrows from anywhere
- Customizable teammate nameplates with distance indicators

**🎨 Visual Customization**
- Adjustable marker scale
- Toggle visibility on/off easily

**⚡ Performance Optimized**
- Lightweight implementation with minimal impact on FPS
- Efficient rendering system that doesn't strain your client

**🔧 Easy Configuration**
- In-game settings menu for quick adjustments
- Persistent configuration that saves between sessions

## Compatibility
This mod only works on servers that use the [Apollo API](https://lunarclient.dev/apollo/introduction). Many popular servers including Hoplite, Hypixel and others use this integration.

## Developers
If you want to add teammate tracking support to your server, enable and configure [Apollo API](https://lunarclient.dev/apollo/introduction)'s [Team Module](https://lunarclient.dev/apollo/developers/modules/team). The integration is straightforward and provides a robust foundation for team-based gameplay features.

## Support
Having issues or want to suggest new features? Join my [Discord community](https://discord.gg/9cGtmS8Sb8) for support, updates, and to connect with other users.

**Bug Reports:** Please report any issues on my [GitHub Issues page](https://github.com/SorkoPiko/Teammates/issues). Tell me what you did when it crashed and your mod version.
